title: Tamil Nadu Exit Polls:  Massive Youth Shift As Ruling Party Rejects Survey Data | Vijay Next CM?
description:
Recent exit poll data for the Tamil Nadu assembly elections indicates a significant shift in voter demographics, particularly among the youth. The survey projects that a massive majority of first-time voters and those under thirty are supporting a new political entrant, moving away from the traditional regional parties. The data also suggests this new challenger is making inroads into various community vote banks, including Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes, which traditionally supported the established parties. Representatives from the ruling party and the primary opposition have completely dismissed the survey numbers. The ruling party spokesperson rejected the data, asserting they will secure a massive majority and form the government independently, while labeling the new challenger as a mere vote cutter. Similarly, the main opposition representative called the poll's arithmetic flawed, arguing that the new entrant will negatively impact the ruling party rather than their own vote share. The final election results will be declared on Monday.

title: Big Fight in Tamil Nadu: DMK vs AIADMK vs New Challengers
description:
தமிழ்நாடு தேர்தல் 🔥 கடும் போட்டி😳யார் ஜெயிப்பார்? #dmk #mkstalin#thalapathy #tvk #election #politics
Tamilnadu assembly election 2026 #thalapathy  #tvk #mkstalin  #dmk #politics #election #shortsLatest updates on Tamil Nadu Assembly Election 2026! Thalapathy Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) is gearing up to contest alone, with no alliances. In his recent Erode rally on December 18, 2025, Vijay called DMK an "evil force" (theeya sakthi) and TVK a "pure force" (thooya sakthi), launching a strong attack on the ruling party. MK Stalin-led DMK has formed a manifesto committee headed by Kanimozhi, focusing on jobs, women's welfare, farmers, and state rights.TVK's internal survey claims over 30% vote share, with projections showing a close race: DMK around 32-33%, TVK 31%, and AIADMK trailing. Vijay declared himself as CM candidate, positioning TVK as the main challenger in a potential three-way fight with DMK and AIADMK. Tamil Nadu politics is heating up with minority outreach and sharp criticisms!In this video:2026 election latest news and updatesThalapathy Vijay TVK campaign highlights from Erode rallyMK Stalin DMK strategy and manifesto plansOpinion polls and predictionsLike, share, subscribe and hit the bell icon! 🔔 Comment below - Who will win? TVK or DMK?TAMIL LANGUAGE தமிழ்நாடு சட்டமன்ற தேர்தல் 2026: தளபதி விஜய் TVK vs MK ஸ்டாலின் DMK - யார் வெல்ல போகிறார்? 🎉🔥2026 தமிழ்நாடு அசெம்பிளி எலக்ஷன் பற்றிய லேட்டஸ்ட் அப்டேட்ஸ்! தளபதி விஜய்யின் தமிழக வெற்றி கழகம் (TVK) சுயேச்சையாக போட்டியிட தயாராகி வருகிறது. விஜய் "தூய சக்தி" என்று TVK-ஐ அழைத்து, DMK-ஐ "தீய சக்தி" என்று விமர்சித்துள்ளார். MK ஸ்டாலின் தலைமையிலான DMK மீண்டும் வெற்றி பெற திட்டமிட்டு, மேனிஃபெஸ்டோ கமிட்டி அமைத்துள்ளது.TVK இன்டர்னல் சர்வேயில் 30% வோட் ஷேர் க்ளெய்ம்! விஜய் CM கேண்டிடேட் ஆக அறிவிக்கப்பட்டு, அலையன்ஸ் இல்லாமல் போட்டி. DMK vs TVK vs AIADMK - மூன்று முனை போட்டி உறுதி? தமிழ்நாடு அரசியல் இப்போது ஹாட் டாபிக்!இந்த வீடியோவில்:2026 தேர்தல் லேட்டஸ்ட் நியூஸ் & அப்டேட்ஸ்தளபதி விஜய் TVK கேம்பெய்ன் ஹைலைட்ஸ்MK ஸ்டாலின் DMK ஸ்ட்ராடஜிஒபினியன் போல்ஸ் & ப்ரிடிக்ஷன்ஸ்லைக், ஷேர், சப்ஸ்க்ரைப் செய்து பெல் ஐகானை கிளிக் செய்யுங்கள்! 🔔 கமெண்டில் உங்கள் ஒபினியன் சொல்லுங்கள் - யார் வெல்லும்? title: MK Stalin's Daughter Senthamarai Stalin & Sabarisan Vote Amid Tamil Nadu Elections | N18S
description:
Tamil Nadu is heading into a tightly contested assembly election in 2026 on April 23, with the ruling Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK), the opposition All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (AIADMK), and actor Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) shaping what is no longer a straightforward bipolar contest.
The state, with 234 assembly seats, has traditionally alternated between the DMK and AIADMK. This time, the entry of TVK has added uncertainty, especially among younger voters.
The DMK, led by Chief Minister MK Stalin, is seeking a second consecutive term. It remains aligned with the Congress and Left parties. The AIADMK, which lost power in 2021, is attempting a comeback and is expected to lean on its ties with the BJP, even as alliances remain fluid. TVK, contesting its first full-fledged election.
Smaller yet influential players such as Pattali Makkal Katchi (in alliance with AIADMK), Desiya Murpokku Dravida Kazhagam (in alliance with DMK), and Naam Tamilar Katchi are expected to impact vote shares across regions, even if they are unlikely to dominate the seat tally in the 234-member assembly.

Latest updates on Tamil Nadu Assembly Election 2026! Thalapathy Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) is gearing up to contest alone, with no alliances. In his recent Erode rally on December 18, 2025, Vijay called DMK an "evil force" (theeya sakthi) and TVK a "pure force" (thooya sakthi), launching a strong attack on the ruling party. MK Stalin-led DMK has formed a manifesto committee headed by Kanimozhi, focusing on jobs, women's welfare, farmers, and state rights.
TVK's internal survey claims over 30% vote share, with projections showing a close race: DMK around 32-33%, TVK 31%, and AIADMK trailing. Vijay declared himself as CM candidate, positioning TVK as the main challenger in a potential three-way fight with DMK and AIADMK. Tamil Nadu politics is heating up with minority outreach and sharp criticisms!
